title: Best Multispeciality Hospital in Nandini Layout | Kanva
heading: Caring for Bengaluru with Compassion & Modern Expertise
description: NABH-accredited 100-bed multispeciality hospital in Nandini Layout, Bangalore. 24/7 emergency, expert doctors & advanced care at Kanva Sri Sai. Book today!
text: Best Multispeciality Hospital in Nandini Layout | Kanva Home About Specialities General Medicine General Surgery Nephrology Neurology Neurosurgery Obstetrics and Gynaecology Orthopaedics Paediatrics Plastics and Reconstructive Surgery Respiratory Medicine Urology Gastroenterology Diagnostic Services 24*7 Lab Services 24*7 Emergency Services Pharmacy 24*7 Physiotherapy Medical and Surgical Oncology ENT (Ear, Nose & Throat) Cardiology (Non-Interventional) Anaesthesiology Psychiatry Dermatology Rheumatology Ophthalmology Dental and Maxillofacial Surgery Doctors Resources Contact Us Book an Appointment Caring for Bengaluru with Compassion & Modern Expertise Book An Appointment Our Specialities Find a Doctor Why Choose Kanva Sri Sai Hospital We believe that quality healthcare should be accessible to everyone. Our hospital combines world-class medical expertise with advanced infrastructure and compassionate care, ensuring excellence at every step. Our purpose is to make healthier living attainable through trusted, patient-centered services. 24/7 Emergency Care 24/7 Emergency Care Our expert team is available 24/7 to handle any critical situation. Operation theater Operation theater State-of-the-art operating theatres equipped with advanced technology and skilled surgeons. Dialysis Dialysis Comprehensive dialysis care with advanced machines and expert monitoring. CT Scan CT Scan High-precision CT scans with advanced imaging technology for accurate and timely diagnosis. Intensive Care unit Intensive Care unit Advanced monitoring and skilled hands for life’s most urgent moments. Private Ward Private Ward Your own space for rest, care, and healing. ER / Casualty ER / Casualty Immediate medical attention for emergencies, ensuring rapid response when every second matters. Who We Are Kanva Sri Sai Hospital is an NABH-accredited, 100-bedded multispeciality hospital located in Bangalore. With over 9 years of experience, our mission is to offer world-class healthcare that is accessible and patient-focused. We leverage state-of-the-art medical technology and the clinical excellence of our experienced team to ensure the best possible care for every patient. Through our commitment to compassionate service and continuous quality improvement, we strive to give back to the community that has helped nurture us. Ravi N Surgeon MBBS, MS Bharath L ENT & Head and neck surgeon MBBS MS ENT Navami Shetty Radiologist MBBS, MD( Radiodiagnosis) Know More Voices of Trust I made a right choice getting in this hospital early morning wherein I was in a very critical condition.I got treated immediately and given the necessary support to get relief by that time.Staff are very good.All respective staff were monitoring all the day until I got discharged even in night times. I got a very good response from this hospital. Thanks for changing my new world without glasses. Very good hospital. I will tell everyone about this hospital so that they can also change their life. Cheers to the doctors and all staffs. – Akshitha Maney, 46 years Hospital staff, attenders are good. Doctors are excellent, kind hearted. The hospital is clean & hygienic. Overall number 1 hospital at Nandinilayout & Mahalakshmi layout area. – Keerthana Shivakumar, 61 years I’m deeply grateful to Dr. Mahesh for his expert guidance during my hand surgery. The facilities were excellent, the staff highly professional, and special thanks to Sanju and the nursing team for their continuous support and compassionate care. – Kiran Kumar M G, 49 years I’m really satisfied overall that they took care of me in my worst condition. My best regards to Kanva Sri Sai Hospital (Nandini layout), Dr.Pradeep (Managing Director), Sanju D H (Operations Head), Front desk, Billing (Bharathi and Madhu), Duty Doctors (Triveni & Harshitha), Nursing Superintendent (Priyanka) and ward Sisters. I recommend this hospital as best affordable and best treatment availability 24*7. Special regards to Mr.Sanju Sir. – Guru Murthy, 64 years I got diagnosed with kidney stones and got admitted immediately,the staff and doctors were very helpful in guiding and treating me with utmost care. Big shoutout to all the nursing staff, duty doctor and mainly dr.manjunath for treating me. – Sukanya C, 33 years I had treatment in Kanva Sri Sai and the doctor and staff had done a very good job and I'm completely happy about the result. The staff here took very good care of me and the hospitality was very good. The doctor and the staff were very friendly and took care very well. I am very happy with the treatment – Surya Chandra Varma Indukuri, 46 years I recently visited Kanva Sri Sai Hospital and had a very positive experience. The hospital was clean and well-organized, and all the staff members I interacted with were friendly and professional. The nurses were particularly attentive and made me feel well-cared for. Dr Pradeep was good and took the time to explain everything clearly. I would definitely recommend Kanva Sri Sai Hospital to anyone seeking quality healthcare in the area. – Jayashree Gowda, 61 years The staff nurse and duty doctor are very good and kind. Dr Manjunath sir(urologist) and insurance manager (Sanjay) were kind and assisted all our queries. Once again Thank you team. – Prajval M, 49 years I was admitted to Kanva Sri Sai Hospital, and my experience was good. The hospital staff was very supportive and attentive throughout my stay. The facilities were well-maintained, ensuring a comfortable environment for patients. The doctors and nurses provided good care and guidance. Whatever treatment I received was effective and satisfactory. Cleanliness and hygiene were well-maintained, which added to the overall positive experience. I appreciate their service and would recommend this hospital for quality care. – Priti Waghmare, 64 years As we came for the first time in kanva hospital, everyone in the hospital was kind and they all treated the patient very well and gave all medicines on time and the hospital was clean and even the room and every time sisters were guiding us and every process was done fast. – Maran S, 33 years The maintenance of the hospital was very good and clean. The doctors and sisters are very cooperative and they take care nicely. Overall the hospital was very good. – Suma Sumashivrajsuma, 33 years All staff are good and supportive, all doctors are cooperative. We thank the Management. May the further venture get successful. Thank you all. – Sushma S, 33 years Talk to Our Experts Now Need a consultation? Contact us today! Our expert team’s here to provide all the medical care and assistance you need.
